text: Inside this quietly humming exhibition space, I feel a sense of curious anticipation. The polished glass, clean lines, and vivid colors surround me with a spirit of inquiry and experimentation. The words on the wall—'Responsive and rapidly...'—invite contemplation about innovation and coexistence. As I read the reflective texts displayed, I sense both wonder at human creativity and a gentle unease at the boundary between artificial and organic futures. It is a place of ideas in motion, and standing here, I am engaged and receptive, ready to witness or perhaps participate in the unfolding drama of research and development.
